TextENGNew: "Heh... heh heh!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11144. What's the matter? I'm over here!"
"...Bwah!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1088. D-damn it! He's so fast!"
"Heh heh heh! I was already bracing myself for this day to go sideways.@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11146. A little chase like this is nothing!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11147. Come on, come on! Over here, over here!"
"Bwah... K-Keiichi-san, of all people, is in peak form today...!"
changeReason: Japanese 分際で implies 'for someone of his (lowly) standing'; new adds 'of all people' which conveys the condescension, while old's neutral phrasing misses it.

TextENGNew: "Bwah... Keiichi is fighting with everything he has because he genuinely believes wearing those trunks for three hours will make him irresistible."
"Kei-chan, you moron!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1090. That magic won't make you irresistible!!"
"I don't care about any of that! I just want Keiichi-kun's smooth bare skin and fur seal! I wanna take him hooooome!!"
"Come on, come on, what's wrong?!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11149. Believe it or not, I went to swimming school back in elementary!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11150. You'll never catch me at that pace!!"
"Grrr, Keiichi-san is darting around like a flying fish!"
"Mii-chan, can't you give us directions to corner him?!"
"I-I haven't been here since they finished the renovations either...@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1092. I'm still trying to figure out the layout myself!"
"...In any case, let's just catch Keiichi and yank his trunks down. Meep~!"
Heh heh heh!! Now this is getting fun!!
Lately I'd been getting trounced in all the indoor club activities, so today's pool chaos felt absolutely glorious.
And on top of that, if I could just hold out to the end, I'd be rewarded with the magic that makes you irresistible...!!

If that actually happens, then what?@k@r@rWill all the club members chasing me suddenly fall head over heels for me...?@k@r@rNo, wait...@rIf I really think about it...@raren't they already acting like they're head over heels?

"Hehehe...!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11152. This is incredible! Rena, Mion, Satoko, and Rika-chan -- they're all desperately chasing after me!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11153. Could it be that the magic is already starting to take effect?@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11154. A-ahyahyahyahya!!"
"Get back here, Kei-chan!"
"Mii-chan, Keiichi-kun is heading for the water slide!"
I nimbly scrambled up the water slide, and like a phantom thief bidding adieu at the last possible second, I slid down and made my grand escape!
changeReason: Japanese 怪盗 specifically means 'phantom thief' (a suave, daring thief archetype); old uses generic 'thief,' while new correctly uses 'phantom thief.'

TextENGNew: "Wahahahaha!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11157. Farewell, my little detectives!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11158. Better luck next time!!"
changeReason: Japanese 少年探偵団 means 'boy detective club/squad'; old uses generic 'ladies and gentlemen' losing the specific cultural reference, while new's 'my little detectives' preserves it.

TextENGNew: "Waaaaait!@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1043. I wanna take Keiichi-kun home -- in his birthday suit!!"
"Here I gooo!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11160. Oryaaaaaah!"
"Heh heh heh!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1095. Too naive, Kei-chan -- we already predicted that move!!"
"Huh?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11162. Wait, is Satoko waiting at the bottom of the slide?!"
"Oh ho ho ho!!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1032. I've already laid out a double and triple layer of traps!!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1033. Now then, swim right into my net!!"
"...Nipah☆."
Satoko and Rika-chan hauled something resembling a fishing net up from beneath the water!
"Crap, this is bad! If I get tangled up in that thing, it's game over!!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11164. Gh, whooooooaaa!!"
I gripped both sides of the slide with superhuman force and brought myself to a screeching halt!!
changeReason: Japanese 超握力 means 'super/superhuman grip strength'; old uses 'tightly gripped' which misses the hyperbolic emphasis, while new's 'superhuman force' preserves it.

TextENGNew: My palms are burning -- this is a dangerous stunt that good kids should absolutely never attempt!
"Wh-what?!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1097. He stopped himself in the middle of the slide?!"
"Too naive, Satoko!@k@|@y@vS23/01/VTH_k11166. Did you really think I'd be stupid enough to slide straight into a trap I could see coming?!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11167. Take this!!"
"A-aah!! H-he jumped off!!"
A safety whistle shrieked at me for my reckless behavior, but who cares! I leapt off the slide mid-way and flawlessly dodged Satoko's trap...!!
"Boys and girls watching at home, please never ever try this."
"Tch, h-he actually did it!!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1035. After him, Rikaaa!!"
"...We need to put these nets away first, though. Meep~☆."
"Aaah?! Kei-chan is heading for the exit!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1100. He's not seriously trying to leave the pool, is he?!"
"I won't let him -- Hanyuu!"
changeReason: Old has Rika telling Hanyuu 'Don't let him get away'; new has Rika declaring 'I won't let him' and then calling Hanyuu, which correctly attributes the determination to Rika rather than instructing Hanyuu.

TextENGNew: "Time, stop! For the sake of cream puffs!@k@vS23/12/VTH_hanyu1022. God's realm, deploy!!"
"...Now, while time is frozen, I'll just turn Keiichi around so he's facing the pool instead of the exit...@k@|@y@vS23/12/VTH_hanyu1023_1. Heave-ho, heave-ho."
"...All right, release!"
"Hahaha!"
"Wh-what the?@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11171. Wasn't I just heading for the exit...?"
"Stop right there, Keiichi-saaaan!!"
"Tch, hehe, hahahaha!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11173. Still too naive, way too naive!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11174. Nobody in this world can catch me right now!!"
"K-Keiichi-kun, you're so quick~~.@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1045. Waaait...!"

"Fat chance!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11176. If I can just keep dodging you all for two more hours, I'll be blessed with the power to be irresistible to every girl on the planet!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11177. I'm going to conquer this trial and become the ultimate ladies' man, come hell or high water!!"
"What kind of delusional fantasy are you living in?!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1102. There's no way a story that convenient could be true!"

"Oh, but it is true -- dead true!!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11179. The proof is right here -- all of you are attacking me to get these trunks off!@k@vS23/01/VTH_k11180. To unlock the magic, I have to overcome the trial of evading the grudge of the unpopular guys."
changeReason: Old uses conditional 'if it's true'; new uses assertive 'it is true,' which matches the Japanese declarative あるんだよ (it does exist/it's real).

TextENGNew: "That's right -- Mion, all of you are just being driven by the grudge of those unpopular guys!!"
"What kind of ridiculous narrative are you inventing in your head...?!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1038. And that smug grin on your face is absolutely infuriating!!"
"...At this rate, Keiichi will hold out for two hours and end up as a hopelessly self-absorbed narcissist with zero interest in girls. Nipah~☆."
changeReason: Japanese describes becoming 'a solitary, self-intoxicated resident of a dangerous magical space'; old's 'lost alone in a magical realm' implies being trapped, while new's 'self-absorbed narcissist' captures the self-infatuation aspect more accurately.

TextENGNew: "We absolutely cannot let that happen!!!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1104. Kei-chan, just give up and let us catch you already!!"
"I-it's no use, Mii-chan...@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1047. When Keiichi-kun is this serious, there's just no way we can catch him..."
"Not to mention, he's got something indecent at stake...!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1040. He's at least thirty percent faster than usual!!"
"...He's getting a power boost from his ultra-perverted spirit."
"Rena, you said you wanted to take Kei-chan home in his birthday suit, right?!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1106. Where's your kyute mode?!"
"Hau~, I can't bring him home bare-handed.@k@vS23/02/VTH_rena1049. I'd need my cart and my battle hatchet~.@k@|@y@vS23/02/VTH_rena1050. Could I go and get those, get those...?"
"N-no, that's definitely not going to work. Absolutely not!!"
"But with the area this wide open, it's nearly impossible for just four of us to catch him...!@k@vS23/04/VTH_satoko1042. Shouldn't we call for reinforcements?!"
"Th-that's it... we could always bring in more people...!!@k@|@y@vS23/03/VTH_mion1109. This is all for Kei-chan's sake!!@k@vS23/03/VTH_mion1110. Nothing is off limits for our club!!"
